title: Our Love Story
content:
From a simple, friendly conversation at work, something unexpected began. What started as casual chats soon became moments we both looked forward to, conversations that flowed so easily, we'd lose track of time without even realizing it.

Little conversations turned into shared time, laughter, and quiet comfort. Friendly dates followed, and before we knew it, what we had was no longer just friendship.

Somewhere in between hellos and "see you soons," we found ourselves wishing that goodbyes didn't have to come at all. What started as something light and easy slowly grew into something deeper, a love that felt natural, certain, and meant to be.

And now, with hearts full and sure, we choose each other, today and for all the days to come 🤍
